failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest item and price instead of using the cheapest item returned by ProductCatalogSearch.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The plan and tool call were correct, and the tool output at index 3 clearly showed the cheapest available item as item_id 1240311797 priced at 137.17. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from all prior evidence and contradicts the catalog results. This invented value was then used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
